name: Vy Global Growth
description: Vy Global Growth is a blank check company, also known as a special purpose acquisition company (SPAC), incorporated in the Cayman Islands. The company was established for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. It focuses on identifying and partnering with innovative, high-growth companies to take them public through a business combination. As a SPAC, it does not have any commercial operations of its own and relies on its management team to identify suitable acquisition targets.
